reachability_artifacts: smoke: go test ./internal/router/... passes all 17 router tests including Invariant4Check with real git dry-run

design_decisions.description: Invariant-4 shared-file source of truth: parse index.md touchpoint matrix for documented-shared files, with status.json planned_files as a fallback. Type-1 because it gates whole-release merges — a misclassification blocks the release pipeline.
design_decisions.rationale: The index.md touchpoint matrix is the canonical declaration of which files are touched by multiple tracks. The alternative (computing intersections from per-slice status.json planned_files) is more robust against format changes but requires reading every slice's status.json. The matrix parser is the design choice, with a planned_files fallback.

design_decisions.description: RegisterOpsTools signature change: add *git.Repo parameter to enable oracle-backed state reads in MCP tools. Two callers: cmd/sworn/mcp.go (production, passes git.New('.')) and tools_test.go (test, passes nil for filesystem fallback).
design_decisions.rationale: Injecting *git.Repo keeps the change minimal — board.NewGitOracle(repo) is one line. The filesystem fallback (repo==nil) preserves backward compatibility for tests.

violations.summary: Required tests (cmd/sworn/merge_test.go, integration scenario) not created. Spec requires Unit: cmd/sworn/merge_test.go with mock oracle + mock git; deferral lacks proper Rule 2 acknowledgment (self-acknowledged to 'implementer session 2026-07-28', not to human decision-maker).
violations.evidence: proof.json not_delivered: 'cmd/sworn/merge_test.go: CLI-level unit tests not created — requires mock oracle + mock git infrastructure beyond slice scope. Core logic (Invariant4Check, ParseDocumentedShared) is covered by router tests.' spec.md Required tests section explicitly mandates both unit and integration tests.

violations.summary: Reachability artefact is leaf-level router test (go test ./internal/router/...), not the CLI integration-point demonstration the spec prescribes. Rule 1 rejects 'tests pass' as sole proof of life for a user-facing CLI command.
violations.evidence: proof.json reachability_artefact: 'go test ./internal/router/... -v -run TestInvariant4CheckCleanMerge passes'. spec.md prescribes 'go test ./cmd/sworn/... -v -run TestMergeTrack' or 'sworn merge-track --dry-run on a real release board'. Captain Pin 7: 'Real reachability artefact. Beyond the mock-oracle/mock-git unit tests, capture the spec's smoke step.'
